question: How do I reset my password?
answer: Click the Forgot Password option on the sign in page and follow the reset link sent to your registered email.

question: I forgot my password and cannot log in.
answer: Use the Forgot Password option to create a new password. If the reset email does not arrive, check your spam folder or try again after a few minutes.

question: How do I change my email address?
answer: Open your account settings and update your email address from the profile section. You may need to verify the new address before it becomes active.

question: How do I change my username?
answer: You can change your username from your account or profile settings if that option is available in your app. Open your profile, edit the username field, and save the changes.

question: How do I update my phone number?
answer: You can update your phone number from profile settings in your account. A one time verification code may be sent to confirm the change.

question: How do I change my delivery address after placing an order?
answer: You can change the delivery address before the order is packed. Go to your order details and choose Edit Address if the option is available.

question: My account is locked. What should I do?
answer: Wait a few minutes and try again, then reset your password if needed. If the issue continues, contact support so we can help unlock your account.

question: How do I delete my account?
answer: Please contact customer support from the help section to request account deletion. We may verify your identity before processing the request.

question: How do I verify my email address?
answer: Open the verification email we sent after signup and click the confirmation link. If you cannot find it, request a new verification email from account settings.

question: Why am I not receiving the OTP?
answer: Please confirm that your phone number is correct, wait a minute, and request a new OTP. Network delays can sometimes slow delivery.

question: How can I update notification settings?
answer: Go to account settings and open Notifications to manage email, SMS, and app alert preferences.

question: How can I unsubscribe from promotional emails?
answer: Click the unsubscribe link in any marketing email or update your communication preferences in account settings.

question: Where can I track my order?
answer: You can track your order from your dashboard under the Orders section. Tracking updates appear after the package is dispatched.

question: How do I get shipping updates?
answer: Shipping updates are available on the order details page and may also be sent by email or SMS if notifications are enabled.

question: How long does delivery take?
answer: Standard delivery usually takes 3 to 7 business days depending on your location and product availability.

question: Do you offer same day delivery?
answer: Same day delivery is available only for selected products and eligible pin codes. Availability is shown during checkout.

question: Do you deliver on weekends?
answer: Weekend delivery depends on your courier partner and location. The estimated delivery date shown at checkout is the best reference.

question: Can I schedule a delivery slot?
answer: Scheduled delivery is supported only for selected locations and products. If available, the option appears during checkout.

question: What are the delivery charges?
answer: Delivery charges depend on your location, seller, and total order value. Final shipping costs are shown before payment.

question: Do you provide free shipping?
answer: Free shipping may be available on selected offers or when your order crosses the minimum order value.

question: Which locations do you deliver to?
answer: We deliver to most serviceable areas. You can check delivery availability by entering your pin code on the product page or at checkout.

question: Do you ship internationally?
answer: International shipping is available only for selected products and destinations. Shipping availability is shown during checkout.

question: What happens if I miss the delivery?
answer: The courier may attempt delivery again or contact you for rescheduling. If all attempts fail, the package may be returned to the seller.

question: How many delivery attempts will the courier make?
answer: Most courier partners make two or three delivery attempts before returning the package. The exact number depends on the courier.

question: Is signature required on delivery?
answer: Some high value orders or seller fulfilled shipments may require a signature or OTP confirmation at delivery.

question: Why was my order delayed?
answer: Delays can happen because of weather, courier issues, high order volume, address problems, or seller dispatch delays.

question: Why was my order cancelled?
answer: Orders may be cancelled because of stock issues, payment problems, seller constraints, or verification failures. The reason is usually shown in your order details.

question: Can I add an item to an existing order?
answer: Once an order is placed, items usually cannot be added. You can place a separate order for the additional product.

question: Can I split delivery for my order?
answer: Orders may arrive in separate shipments if items are stored in different warehouses or sold by different sellers.

question: Can I reorder a past purchase?
answer: Yes, open your order history, find the past order, and use the Buy Again option if the item is still available.

question: Can I cancel my order?
answer: Yes, you can cancel your order before it has been shipped. Open the order details page and choose Cancel Order if the option is available.

question: Can I cancel only one item from my order?
answer: Yes, if the items are still eligible for cancellation, you can cancel a single item from a multi item order from the order details page.

question: Can I cancel a preorder?
answer: Most preorders can be cancelled before dispatch unless the product page states otherwise.

question: How do preorders work?
answer: Preorders let you reserve upcoming products before release. The product page shows the expected launch and shipping timeline.

question: When will my preorder be charged?
answer: Payment timing depends on the payment method and seller policy. Some orders are charged immediately while others are charged closer to dispatch.

question: How do I return a product?
answer: Go to your Orders page, choose the item, and select Return or Replace if the product is still within the return window.

question: What is the return policy?
answer: Return eligibility depends on the category, seller policy, and item condition. The product page and order details page show the applicable return window.

question: How many days do I have to return an item?
answer: Most eligible items can be returned within 7 to 10 days of delivery, but the exact return window depends on the product category.

question: Can I exchange an item instead of returning it?
answer: Exchange is available only for selected items such as size or color variants. If exchange is not available, you can place a new order after return pickup.

question: Is return pickup available?
answer: Return pickup is available in many serviceable locations. If pickup is not supported, you may be asked to self ship the item.

question: Who pays for return shipping?
answer: If the return is due to a damaged, defective, or wrong item, return shipping is usually free. For other cases, seller policies may apply.

question: How long does a refund take?
answer: Refunds are processed automatically once a return is received and inspected. It typically takes 3-5 business days for the amount to reflect in your original payment method. Store credit is available immediately.

question: How do refunds work?
answer: After a return or cancellation is approved, we immediately initiate a refund. It will be sent to your original payment method or issued as store credit, so you get your money back faster.

question: Can I get a refund if my order is cancelled?
answer: Yes, if your cancelled order was prepaid, the refund is processed automatically to the original payment method or store balance as applicable.

question: My payment failed. What should I do?
answer: If the payment failed, please retry with the same or a different payment method. If money was debited, it is usually reversed automatically by your bank.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept credit cards, debit cards, UPI, net banking, selected wallets, cash on delivery for eligible orders, and EMI on supported products.

question: Do you offer cash on delivery?
answer: Cash on delivery is available only for selected locations, products, and order values. The option appears during checkout if eligible.

question: Can I pay with UPI?
answer: Yes, UPI is supported for eligible orders. Choose the UPI option at checkout and complete the payment using your preferred app.

question: Can I pay using a wallet?
answer: Selected wallets may be available at checkout depending on the seller, product type, and current payment offers.

question: Is EMI available?
answer: EMI is available on selected products and eligible cards or financing partners. Options are displayed during checkout when supported.

question: My card was charged twice. What should I do?
answer: Please wait for your bank to reconcile the duplicate transaction. If the extra charge is not reversed within the bank timeline, contact support with the payment reference.

question: How do I download an invoice?
answer: Open the order details page and select Download Invoice if the seller has generated the invoice.

question: Can I get a GST invoice?
answer: GST invoices are available for eligible products and sellers. Enter your GST details during checkout if the option is shown.

question: How do I update GST details?
answer: GST details can usually be added during checkout for eligible business purchases. Some sellers do not support GST invoices.

question: How do bulk orders work?
answer: Bulk order support depends on the seller and available stock. For large quantities, contact support or the seller before placing the order.

question: Do you offer business invoices?
answer: Business invoices may be available for eligible orders depending on the seller and product category.

question: How can I contact support?
answer: You can contact support through live chat, email, or the help section in your account. Available channels may vary by issue type.

question: What are your support hours?
answer: Chat support is generally available throughout the day, while response times for email may vary based on queue volume.

question: Do you have phone support?
answer: Phone support may be available for selected issues. If available, the callback option appears in the help section.

question: How do I report a damaged item?
answer: Open the order details page, choose the affected item, and submit a return or damage report with photos if requested.

question: What if an item is missing from my order?
answer: Please check if the order was split into multiple shipments. If the item is still missing, report it from the order details page.

question: What should I do if I received the wrong product?
answer: Go to the order details page and select Return or Replace. Choose Wrong Item Received and follow the instructions.

question: I received the wrong item.
answer: Go to the order details page and select Return or Replace. Choose Wrong Item Received and follow the instructions.

question: What should I do if I received an expired product?
answer: Open the order details page and choose Return or Replace. Select Expired Product as the issue and upload clear photos of the product and expiry date if requested.

question: Can I change the size after ordering?
answer: Size changes are usually not possible after the order is placed. You may need to cancel the order before shipment or request a return or exchange after delivery.

question: How do I check product availability?
answer: Stock availability is shown on the product page. If the item is out of stock, you may be able to set a restock alert.

question: Do you restock sold out items?
answer: Many products are restocked when inventory becomes available, but restocking depends on the seller and product type.

question: When will an out of stock item return?
answer: Restock timelines vary by seller and supplier. If available, enable notifications on the product page to get updates.

question: Can I use multiple coupons on one order?
answer: Usually only one coupon or promotion can be applied to an order unless a specific offer says otherwise.

question: Why is my coupon not working?
answer: Coupons may fail because of expiry, seller restrictions, minimum order value, payment conditions, or category exclusions.

question: How do promo codes work?
answer: Enter the promo code at checkout and the discount will apply if the order meets the offer conditions.

question: Do you sell gift cards?
answer: Gift cards may be available during promotions or on selected storefronts depending on the seller.

question: Can I send an order as a gift?
answer: Gift options depend on the seller and product type. If supported, gift messaging or gift wrap options appear during checkout.

question: Is gift wrapping available?
answer: Gift wrapping is available only for selected items and sellers. The option appears during checkout when supported.

question: How do store credits work?
answer: Store credits are applied automatically or can be selected at checkout depending on your account balance and order eligibility.

question: Can I use store credit with a coupon?
answer: In many cases, store credit can be combined with a coupon, but some promotions may restrict combined use.

question: Can I transfer store credit to another account?
answer: Store credit is usually non transferable and can only be used by the account where it was issued.

question: How do loyalty points work?
answer: Eligible purchases earn reward points that can be redeemed on future orders based on the program rules.

question: When do reward points expire?
answer: Reward point expiry depends on the program terms. You can check the expiry date in your rewards section if the feature is available.

question: Can I merge two accounts?
answer: Account merging is usually not supported. Please contact support if you need help accessing an older account.

question: Is my personal data safe?
answer: We use standard security practices to protect account and payment information. Please also keep your password private and use trusted devices.

question: What payment methods are available?
answer: We accept various payment methods including Credit/Debit Cards, UPI, Net Banking, and Cash on Delivery.

question: Tell us about your company
answer: We are a fast and reliable e-commerce delivery company committed to bringing your favorite products straight to your doorstep with speed and safety.

question: How long does replacement take?
answer: A replacement usually takes 3-5 business days after your returned item has been picked up.

question: What are the specifications?
answer: You can find the detailed specifications on the product page under the 'Product Details' or 'Specifications' section.

question: Do you have this in another size/color?
answer: Available sizes and colors are shown on the product page. If it is greyed out, it is currently out of stock.

question: Is this original/authentic?
answer: Yes, we only sell 100% authentic and original products sourced directly from brands or authorized distributors.

question: Any offers available?
answer: You can check our homepage or the 'Offers' section for the latest deals and discounts.

question: Cashback not received
answer: Cashback is usually credited within 24-48 hours after your order has been successfully delivered. Please check your wallet or bank statement.

question: I want to talk to a human agent
answer: I can connect you to a live chat agent. Please type exactly what your issue is so I can route you to the correct department.

question: How to raise a complaint?
answer: To raise a complaint, go to your Orders -> Help -> Raise an issue. Alternatively, you can describe your issue here and I will take a note of it.

question: My issue is not resolved
answer: I apologize for the inconvenience. Let me review your issue history and connect you with a senior support executive for faster resolution.

question: Add to wishlist
answer: You can add an item to your wishlist by clicking the heart icon next to the product image on the product page.

question: Cancel subscription
answer: To cancel a subscription, visit My Account > Subscriptions, select the active subscription, and click Cancel.

question: Change language/currency
answer: You can change your preferred language and currency from your Profile Settings > Preferences menu.
